hero.headline:
Two Generations of Beautiful
Transformations
hero.subheadline: For over 40 years, Peles Salon & Spa has been Western Pennsylvania's premiere Aveda salon. We use botanical, plant-based products because we care about your hair and your well-being. Walk in stressed, walk out stunning.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Beauty &<br class="hidden md:block"> Wellness Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From precision haircuts to relaxing spa facials, Peles delivers a complete beauty experience using Aveda's botanical products. Every visit leaves you looking and feeling your best.

cards.title: Hair Services
cards.description: Precision cuts, color, keratin treatments, extensions, and styling for every occasion. Our expert stylists create looks you'll love.

cards.title: Spa & Facial Services
cards.description: Signature facials, the Chilled Rose Facial, chemical peels, and skin rejuvenation using botanical products that nourish and restore.

cards.title: Nail Services
cards.description: Professional manicures and pedicures with premium products in a relaxing spa setting. Walk out with flawless nails every time.

cards.title: Lash Services
cards.description: Professional lash extensions and treatments that enhance your natural beauty. Wake up gorgeous, no mascara needed.

cards.title: Waxing Services
cards.description: Full body waxing by experienced estheticians for smooth, long-lasting results. Gentle techniques, minimal discomfort.

cards.title: Makeup Services
cards.description: Professional makeup for weddings, special events, and everyday beauty. High-quality products that photograph beautifully and last all day.

how_it_works.headline: Your Visit in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Book Your Visit
steps.description: Call us or book online at either our Greensburg or Johnstown location. First-time guests receive a complimentary consultation to discuss your goals.

steps.title: Relax & Be Pampered
steps.description: Sit back and enjoy our welcoming atmosphere while our expert stylists and estheticians work their magic using Aveda's botanical products.

steps.title: Leave Feeling Amazing
steps.description: Walk out looking stunning and feeling refreshed. We'll recommend take-home Aveda products to maintain your look between visits.

about.label: Why Clients Choose Peles
about.headline: Family-Owned, Aveda-Powered, Client-Obsessed
about.description: For over 40 years and two generations, Peles Salon and Spa has been Western Pennsylvania's destination for exceptional beauty services. As an official Aveda partner, we use only botanical, plant-based products because what goes on your body matters. Recently ranked a Top Global Salon by HairShow Magazine, our team of expert stylists and estheticians treat every guest like family.

features.title: Aveda Botanical Products
features.description: We exclusively use Aveda's plant-based, cruelty-free products. Better for your hair, better for your skin, better for the planet.

features.title: 40+ Years, Two Generations
features.description: Family-owned since 1986, our expertise is passed down and built upon. That kind of experience shows in every service we provide.

features.title: Top Global Salon Ranked
features.description: Recognized by HairShow Magazine as a Top Global Salon. Our commitment to excellence is noticed by the industry and our guests alike.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every service includes a consultation. We'll recommend exactly what you need — nothing more, nothing less.

guarantee.headline: Our "Beautiful You" Promise
guarantee.description: If you're not completely thrilled with your service, let us know before you leave and we'll make it right on the spot. Your satisfaction isn't just a goal — it's the standard we've upheld for over 40 years. That's why 94% of our guests recommend us to friends and family.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment or do you accept walk-ins?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking an appointment to ensure your preferred stylist is available. However, we do accommodate walk-ins when possible. Call us at 724-834-4400 or book online for the best experience.

faqs.question: What makes Aveda products different?
faqs.answer: Aveda products are botanical and plant-based, cruelty-free, and sustainably sourced. They deliver professional-grade results while being gentle on your hair, skin, and the environment. Our stylists are trained specifically in Aveda techniques.

faqs.question: Do you have multiple locations?
faqs.answer: Yes! We have salons in both Greensburg and Johnstown, Pennsylvania. Both locations offer our full range of hair, spa, nail, lash, and waxing services with the same Aveda-trained team you trust.

faqs.question: Can you do hair and makeup for my wedding?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer full bridal packages including hair styling, makeup, and spa services for brides and their entire wedding party. We recommend booking a trial session 4-6 weeks before your big day.

faqs.question: What should I expect on my first visit?
faqs.answer: First-time guests receive a complimentary consultation where we discuss your hair or skin goals, lifestyle, and preferences. We'll recommend the best services and Aveda products tailored to you. Plan to arrive 10 minutes early to settle in.

testimonials.name: Shelby
testimonials.text: I love Peles! Everyone is so friendly and I feel so welcome there. Stacie does an amazing job every time and I refuse to go elsewhere.

testimonials.name: Jessica
testimonials.text: Jenny is amazing! My grandparents have been going to her for years and we drag in family from out of town. That says everything about the quality here.

testimonials.name: Renny
testimonials.text: Expert stylists, botanical products, great vibe. Always accommodating guests. Peles is the kind of salon you stay loyal to for life.

contact.headline:
Ready for Your Best
Hair Day Ever?
contact.subtitle: Book a complimentary consultation and discover why Western PA families have trusted Peles for over 40 years. Two locations, one beautiful experience.

footer.description: Family-owned Aveda salon & spa. Serving Western Pennsylvania since 1986.
